outreachTemplates.shortIntro: Hi, I'm a senior software engineer based in San Francisco. My LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/janedeveloper/
outreachTemplates.interestInRole: Thanks for reaching out; I'm interested in full-time remote roles and happy to chat and learn more about the opportunity.
outreachTemplates.detailedPitch:
I have 8+ years of experience building high-scale distributed systems, primarily in Java and Python on AWS. I've led backend platforms serving millions of users, hold a patent for work in data management, and have been formally recognized for delivering company-wide engineering infrastructure.

At this stage in my career, especially with the rise of AI reducing technological barriers, I'm confident in my ability to work across a broad range of technologies. While my foundation is in Java and AWS, the core architectural and engineering principles I rely on translate effectively across languages and platforms.

I look forward to the opportunity to connect and discuss how I can contribute to your team.
